videos.title: Logitech Spotlight 2 Action Button Guide: Setting Up Smart Actions
videos.description:
Do you want to unlock faster workflows and navigate your slides completely hands-free?

In this step-by-step tutorial, learn how to configure the brand-new programmable Action Button on your Logitech Spotlight 2 Presenter using the Logi Options+ App. We show you how to map custom shortcuts, and trigger macros or Smart Actions.

Key Action Button Customization Covered:
- Shortcut Remapping: Assign everyday commands like play/pause, media control, or slide navigation to the Action button.
- Smart

videos.description:
Do you want to stay perfectly on track and manage your time seamlessly during high-stakes presentations?

In this step-by-step tutorial, learn how to configure the time-management tools on your new Logitech Spotlight 2 Presenter using the Logi Options+ App. We show you how to set up haptic vibration alerts to keep you on schedule without checking your watch or phone while presenting.

videos.title: Logitech Spotlight 2 Tutorial: How to customize advanced Highlight Effects
videos.description:
Do you want to make your presentations more engaging during your next meeting?

In this step-by-step tutorial, learn how to set up your new Logitech Spotlight 2 Presenter and fully customize its advanced Pointer Effects using the Logi Options+ App. We show you how to configure button press sensitivity and assign custom styles to give you ultimate control over your slides.

Key Pointer Effects Covered:
- Dual-Control: Map separate actions via a Soft Press or a Hard Press.
- Digital Pointer & Curs

videos.title: Logitech Spotlight 2 - Captivate your audience with confidence
videos.description:
Join the marketing and product team as they introduce Spotlight 2, Logitech's advanced presenter with haptics. See how this device helps you confidently take control of your presentations and captivate your audience's attention.

Product Introduction:
0:00 - Intro
0:26 - Haptic Feedback
0:39 - Digital Highlighting
0:56 - Customizable Actions
1:11 - Design, Colors, Charging
1:34 - Guided Breathing
1:56 - Connectivity
2:10 - Outro

videos.title: Logitech Spotlight 2 Presenter: Features & Options+ Customization
videos.description:
Are you looking for a way to give more engaging presentations and feel completely confident in front of your audience?

Meet the all-new Logitech Spotlight 2 flagship Presenter! In this episode of You’ve Got Options, we show you how to customize Spotlight 2 using the Logi Options+ App to elevate your hybrid, remote, or in-person meetings.

Customization Features in Options+:
- Pointer Effects: Configure Spotlight, Squarelight, Magnify, and Annotate effects.

videos.title: The ultimate guide to customizing the Mobi Fold Actions Ring with Options+
videos.description:
Ready to supercharge your workflow with the Logitech Mobi Fold?

In this tutorial, we dive deep into the Actions Ring—a customizable onscreen overlay that acts as a digital extension of your mouse. Accessible with just a click, the Actions Ring adjusts to the app you are currently using, providing instant access to tools, Smart Actions, and essential app shortcuts.

Stop struggling to remember complex shortcuts and start working smarter on the go. With eight customizable bubbles, the Actions Rin

videos.title: How to seamlessly switch Mobi Fold between devices with Easy-Switch
videos.description:
Are you looking for the fastest way to switch your Mobi Fold mouse between your laptop, tablet, and phone?

In this tutorial, we demonstrate how to use the Easy-Switch feature on your new Logitech Mobi Fold. Learn the step-by-step process to pair up to three different devices using Bluetooth channels. We cover how to initiate pairing mode by holding the Easy-Switch button until the LED blinks rapidly, allowing you to transition seamlessly between your workstation and mobile devices with a single

videos.title: How to customize your Mobi Fold Point & Scroll with Logi Options+
videos.description:
Are you looking to optimize your workflow with the new Mobi Fold? 
This tutorial guide provides a step-by-step walkthrough on how to customize your device using the Logi Options+ App. 
Learn how to connect your mouse via Bluetooth and navigate the ""Point and Scroll"" menu to tailor your experience. We cover how to adjust the pointer speed and the scroll speed of the touch panel to find the feel that is just right for you. Additionally, Mac users will learn how to enable and use the Smart Zoom f

videos.title: Customize your Mobi Fold mouse buttons for enhanced productivity
videos.description:
Are you looking for the best way to personalize your new Mobi Fold mouse?

In this tutorial, we walk you through the three simple steps to customize the buttons on your ultra-portable Mobi Fold using the Logi Options+ App. You will learn how to:

- Connect and Setup: Ensure you have the latest version of Logi Options+ and connect your device via Bluetooth.
- Button Personalization: Change the default forward and back buttons to your favorite actions like redo, paste, or close tab.
- App-Specific
